command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time, shlex
cmd = ['bun','test','./src/handlers/review.test.ts','--filter','timeout']
start = time.time()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
dur = int((time.time()-start)*1000)
print(f'EXIT={proc.returncode}')
print(f'DURATION_MS={dur}')
print(proc.stdout)
print(proc.stderr)
PY
